raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against Citibank regarding multiple disputed transactions on my My Best Buy Visa credit card. 

I identified several unauthorized and/or incorrect charges on my account and promptly submitted disputes through Citibanks dispute system. These transactions include amounts such as {$280.00}, {$230.00}, and several smaller charges such as : {$17.00} {$30.00} {$40.00} {$25.00} {$15.00} Despite my timely dispute, Citibank has failed to properly investigate these transactions in accordance with the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). I have reason to believe the investigation process has been inadequate and not conducted in good faith. 

These charges are either unauthorized or involve billing errors, and I have not received proper resolution, clear communication, or supporting documentation explaining any decisions made.
